_comment: DeepSpeed SuperOffload config for GB200. Offloads optimizer state and params to Grace LPDDR5X over coherent NVLink-C2C. Requires DeepSpeed >= 0.18.0 on an arm64 (Grace) host. Numbers are GH200-derived until measured on GB200.

zero_optimization._super_offload_comment: Grace-aware coherent-memory offload path (DeepSpeed >= 0.18.0); uses NVLink-C2C rather than PCIe staging.

aio._comment: Keep NVMe as the last-resort tier only; Grace memory is ~16x faster, so prefer offload_*.device=cpu.
